description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Apache Kafka implemented in Go, leveraging franz-go and mcp-go.

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-9h8m-3fm2-qjrq in go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk@1.35.0
findings.recommendation: Upgrade go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk to a version that resolves GHSA-9h8m-3fm2-qjrq. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-9h8m-3fm2-qjrq for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
